title: Interactive Darkmode Energy Consumption Dashboard

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: Interactive Darkmode Energy Consumption Dashboard

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#411C56`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'>
<g transform='translate(50,50)'>
  <rect x='0' y='0' width='300' height='250' rx='10' fill='#090a0f'/>
  <rect x='10' y='10' width='280' height='30' rx='5' fill='#C06C88'/>
  <rect x='10' y='50' width='280' height='30' rx='5' fill='#C06C88'/>
  <rect x='10' y='90' width='280' height='30' rx='5' fill='#C06C88'/>
  <rect x='10' y='130' width='280' height='30' rx='5' fill='#C06C88'/>
  <g transform='translate(15,15)'>
    <text x='0' y='15' fill='#B7D7CD' font-size='18' font-family='Arial, sans-serif'>Room 1</text>
    <text x='140' y='15' fill='#B7D7CD' font-size='18' font-family='Arial, sans-serif'>Room 2</text>
    <text x='280' y='15' fill='#B7D7CD' font-size='18' font-family='Arial, sans-serif'>Room 3</text>
  </g>
  <g transform='translate(15,65)'>
    <rect x='0' y='0' width='80' height='20' fill='#411C56' rx='5'/>
    <rect x='90' y='0' width='80' height='20' fill='#411C56' rx='5'/>
    <rect x='180' y='0' width='80' height='20' fill='#411C56' rx='5'/>
  </g>
  <g transform='translate(15,115)'>
    <text x='0' y='15' fill='#B7D7CD' font-size='18' font-family='Arial, sans-serif'>Energy Usage</text>
    <text x='140' y='15' fill='#B7D7CD' font-size='18' font-family='Arial, sans-serif'>Energy Efficiency</text>
    <text x='280' y='15' fill='#B7D7CD' font-size='18' font-family='Arial, sans-serif'>Comparison</text>
  </g>
  <g transform='translate(15,165)'>
    <rect x='0' y='0' width='80' height='20' fill='#411C56' rx='5'/>
    <rect x='90' y='0' width='80' height='20' fill='#411C56' rx='5'/>
    <rect x='180' y='0' width='80' height='20' fill='#411C56' rx='5'/>
  </g>
  <g transform='translate(15,215)'>
    <rect x='0' y='0' width='80' height='20' fill='#411C56' rx='5'/>
    <rect x='90' y='0' width='80' height='20' fill='#411C56' rx='5'/>
    <rect x='180' y='0' width='80' height='20' fill='#411C56' rx='5'/>
  </g>
  <circle cx='150' cy='20' r='10' fill='#C06C88'/>
  <circle cx='220' cy='20' r='10' fill='#C06C88'/>
  <circle cx='290' cy='20' r='10' fill='#C06C88'/>
</g>
</svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Use the provided color palette strictly and ensure all design elements match the target visual mockup.
Implement a dark mode toggle that switches the background and text colors.
Implement interactive filters for energy usage and energy efficiency, which should update the chart accordingly.

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: Interactive Darkmode Energy Consumption Dashboard

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Verify interactive state updates, dark mode toggle, filters, and chart updates.
Review code cleanliness, proper semantic elements, and efficient state use.
